title: I Wish I Had A Quiet Tomb
content:
"I wish I had a quiet tomb,
        Beside a little rill;
        Where birds, and bees, and butterflies,
        Would sing upon the hill."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Louisa May Alcott, titled "I Wish I Had A Quiet Tomb", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
